An '''Ethrani ourobouros''' was a creature<ref name="RotSN">[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]]</ref> from the [[Ethrani system/Legends|Ethrani system]]<ref name="Planetnamia" /> of the [[Valahari sector/Legends|Valahari sector]], a part of the [[D'Astan sector/Legends|D'Astan sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> and the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]].<ref name="New Territories">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} places the [[Ethrani system/Legends|Ethrani system]] in grid square N-5, which, according to ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', is located in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].</ref> Ethrani ourobouroi were known for [[Diet/Legends|devouring]] their own tails.<ref name="RotSN" /> During a [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|battle]] near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]<ref name="RotSN" /> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]] to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]</ref> the [[Head of State/Legends|leader]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] [[Dooku]]—secretly apprentice to the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]]—[[Brain/Legends|mentally]] compared his master's plan to convert [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] to their side by killing his [[Jedi Master/Legends|mentor]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] to an Ethrani ourobouros consuming its own tail.<ref name="RotSN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ethrani ourobouroi were mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|novelization]]<ref name="RotSN" /> to the [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']],<ref name="RotS">{{Film|III}}</ref> which was released on [[May 19]], [[2005]].<ref name="YbY">''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]''</ref> The novelization was written by [[Matthew Stover]] and was released on [[April 2]], 2005.<ref name="Cargo Bay">{{RandomHouseOld|url=author/results.pperl?authorid=30059|text=Matthew Woodring Stover}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm}}
